mapper.select:
SELECT ci.id AS class_id, ci.name, COALESCE(ci.description, '') AS description, ui.id AS creator_id, ci.is_public FROM class_info ci LEFT JOIN user_info ui ON ui.id = ci.created_by_user_id AND ui.is_del = 0 WHERE ci.is_del = 0 AND (
1 = 1
ci.is_public = 1
OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM resource_permission rp WHERE rp.resource_type = 'CLASS' AND rp.resource_id = ci.id AND rp.user_id = #{userId} AND rp.is_del = 0 ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM class_student_rel csr WHERE csr.class_id = ci.id AND csr.user_id = #{userId} AND csr.is_del = 0 )
) ORDER BY ci.id DESC

SELECT ui.id AS user_id, ui.username, ui.nickname, cmr.joined_at FROM class_student_rel cmr INNER JOIN user_info ui ON ui.id = cmr.user_id WHERE cmr.class_id = #{classId} AND cmr.is_del = 0 AND ui.is_del = 0 ORDER BY cmr.joined_at DESC, cmr.id DESC
SELECT c.id AS id, c.title AS title FROM class_contest_rel ccr INNER JOIN contest c ON c.id = ccr.contest_id WHERE ccr.class_id = #{classId} AND ccr.is_del = 0 AND c.is_del = 0 ORDER BY ccr.id DESC

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.nickname, COUNT(DISTINCT sub_ac.problem_id) AS ac_count, COALESCE(sub_total.cnt, 0) AS submit_count FROM class_student_rel csr JOIN user_info u ON u.id = csr.user_id AND u.is_del = 0 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT s.user_id, s.problem_id FROM submission s WHERE s.verdict = 'Accepted' AND s.is_del = 0 AND s.problem_id IN ( SELECT apr.problem_id FROM assignment a JOIN assignment_problem_rel apr ON apr.assignment_id = a.id AND apr.is_del = 0 WHERE a.class_id = #{classId} AND a.is_del = 0 AND a.status != 'DRAFT' ) ) sub_ac ON sub_ac.user_id = csr.user_id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT s2.user_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM submission s2 WHERE s2.is_del = 0 AND s2.problem_id IN ( SELECT apr2.problem_id FROM assignment a2 JOIN assignment_problem_rel apr2 ON apr2.assignment_id = a2.id AND apr2.is_del = 0 WHERE a2.class_id = #{classId} AND a2.is_del = 0 AND a2.status != 'DRAFT' ) GROUP BY s2.user_id ) sub_total ON sub_total.user_id = csr.user_id WHERE csr.class_id = #{classId} AND csr.is_del = 0 GROUP BY u.id, sub_total.cnt ORDER BY ac_count DESC

SELECT a.id AS assignment_id, a.title, a.status, a.deadline, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment_problem_rel apr WHERE apr.assignment_id = a.id AND apr.is_del = 0) AS problem_count, COALESCE( ROUND( (SELECT AVG(student_ac.ac_cnt * 100.0 / NULLIF(pc.cnt, 0)) FROM (SELECT csr2.user_id, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s2.verdict = 'Accepted' THEN s2.problem_id END) AS ac_cnt FROM class_student_rel csr2 LEFT JOIN submission s2 ON s2.user_id = csr2.user_id AND s2.is_del = 0 AND s2.problem_id IN (SELECT apr2.problem_id FROM assignment_problem_rel apr2 WHERE apr2.assignment_id = a.id AND apr2.is_del = 0) WHERE csr2.class_id = #{classId} AND csr2.is_del = 0 GROUP BY csr2.user_id) student_ac, (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM assignment_problem_rel apr3 WHERE apr3.assignment_id = a.id AND apr3.is_del = 0) pc), 1), 0) AS avg_completion_rate FROM assignment a WHERE a.class_id = #{classId} AND a.is_del = 0 AND a.status != 'DRAFT' ORDER BY a.created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT apr.problem_id) FROM assignment a JOIN assignment_problem_rel apr ON apr.assignment_id = a.id AND apr.is_del = 0 WHERE a.class_id = #{classId} AND a.is_del = 0 AND a.status != 'DRAFT'

SELECT p.pid, p.title, ANY_VALUE(apr.weight) AS weight, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.verdict = 'Accepted' THEN s.user_id END) AS ac_count, COUNT(DISTINCT s.user_id) AS attempt_count, ROUND( COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.verdict = 'Accepted' THEN s.user_id END) * 100.0 / NULLIF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM class_student_rel WHERE class_id = #{classId} AND is_del = 0), 0), 1) AS ac_rate FROM assignment_problem_rel apr JOIN problem p ON p.id = apr.problem_id AND p.is_del = 0 LEFT JOIN submission s ON s.problem_id = apr.problem_id AND s.is_del = 0 AND s.user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM class_student_rel WHERE class_id = #{classId} AND is_del = 0) WHERE apr.assignment_id = #{assignmentId} AND apr.is_del = 0 GROUP BY apr.problem_id ORDER BY ANY_VALUE(apr.sort_order)

SELECT u.id AS user_id, u.username, u.nickname, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN s.verdict = 'Accepted' THEN s.problem_id END) AS ac_count, COUNT(s.id) AS submit_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM assignment_problem_rel apr WHERE apr.assignment_id = #{assignmentId} AND apr.is_del = 0) AS problem_count, CASE WHEN #{deadline} IS NULL THEN TRUE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN s.verdict = 'Accepted' THEN s.submit_time END) IS NULL THEN FALSE WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN s.verdict = 'Accepted' THEN s.submit_time END) <= #{deadline} THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS submitted_before_deadline FROM class_student_rel csr JOIN user_info u ON u.id = csr.user_id AND u.is_del = 0 LEFT JOIN submission s ON s.user_id = csr.user_id AND s.is_del = 0 AND s.problem_id IN (SELECT apr2.problem_id FROM assignment_problem_rel apr2 WHERE apr2.assignment_id = #{assignmentId} AND apr2.is_del = 0) WHERE csr.class_id = #{classId} AND csr.is_del = 0 GROUP BY u.id ORDER BY ac_count DESC
